temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, dark room, a young blonde boy with a distressed and fearful expression is being comforted. A pair of hands rests on his shoulders, but he continues to cry and whimper. (Storyline: The scene opens on a moment of intense distress, establishing the young boy as a character in a state of fear or sadness.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Distressed, whimpering. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:04-00:07) The boy's distress escalates as he begins to sob more loudly, his face contorted in anguish. He looks up and shouts desperately for help. (Storyline: The boy's emotional state worsens, moving from quiet distress to a full-blown cry for help, heightening the sense of immediate danger or tragedy.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Desperate, sobbing. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
